recommendations.title: My All American
recommendations.overview: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

recommendations.title: Marvel One-Shot: All Hail the King
recommendations.overview: A documentary filmmaker interviews the now-famous Trevor Slattery from behind bars.

recommendations.title: 22 vs. Earth
recommendations.overview: Set before the events of ‘Soul’, 22 refuses to go to Earth, enlisting a gang of 5 new souls in attempt of rebellion. However, 22’s subversive plot leads to a surprising revelation about the meaning of life.

recommendations.title: Afterlife of the Party
recommendations.overview: A social butterfly who dies during her birthday week is given a second chance to right her wrongs on Earth.

recommendations.title: Eternity
recommendations.overview: In an afterlife where souls have one week to decide where to spend eternity, Joan is faced with the impossible choice between the man she spent her life with and her first love, who died young and has waited decades for her to arrive.

recommendations.title: Soul
recommendations.overview: Joe Gardner is a middle school teacher with a love for jazz music. After a successful audition at the Half Note Club, he suddenly gets into an accident that separates his soul from his body and is transported to the You Seminar, a center in which sou

recommendations.title: A Dark Song
recommendations.overview: A determined young woman and a damaged occultist risk their lives and souls to perform a dangerous ritual that will grant them what they want.

recommendations.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
recommendations.overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.

recommendations.title: O Lucky Man!
recommendations.overview: An ambitious coffee salesman has a series of improbable and ironic adventures seemingly designed to challenge his naive idealism.

recommendations.title: Gabriel
recommendations.overview: Gabriel tells the story of an archangel who fights to bring light back to purgatory - a place where darkness rules - and save the souls of the city's inhabitants.
